Government of Maharashtra
Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
Government Memorandum, No: - Divyang - 2025 / P.No.222 / E-1608124 / Work-9
Date: 30th March, 2026
Reference: - 1. Government Circular No. Divyang - 2022 / P.S. No.10 / D. C. 2, D. 13th September, 2022.
2. Department No. Disability - 2024 / P.No.135 / DC-2, dated 27th September, 2023.
3. Letter from Commissioner, Divyang Welfare, Pune, No.1807675 / 2025, dated 25.03.2025.
The memo: -

Regarding the prescribed procedure for payment of salaries and non-salaried dues of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Non-Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities, Reference No. The directions have been issued vide Government Circular No.1 dated 13th September, 2022 in Reference No. Instructions have been issued for scrutiny and submission of proposals as per the Scrutiny List prescribed vide letter dated 27.09.2023.

Accordingly, as per the non-payment proposal of Blind Boys Institute G. Nagpur, a school run by Blind Boys Association Nagpur received by the Department from the Commissioner, Divyang Kalyan, Pune, the following funds are being disbursed for grant-in-aid (Programme), 31-Auxiliary Grants (Non-Payment) to NGOs working for persons with disabilities.
(Amount in thousands)

para_trans: 3. Commissioner, Commissionerate of Welfare of Persons with Disabilities, Maharashtra State, Pune to control the expenditure of the said fund.
The controller will remain as the officer. While disbursing the said funds, ensure that the proposal for non-salaried grants is sound.
Only then should the process of disbursing funds to the respective activities be carried out.
4. Subsidiary Grants, Part-I, Roll No. 77 (nine) of the School Code to the concerned activity.
Fund distribution proceedings by verifying that the penalty is applicable or how and if applicable the penalty is imposed.
should be done.
The Controlling Officer shall have control over the expenditure of funds and utilities in section 4 of the aforesaid statement.
The funds should be disbursed subject to submission of certificates, statement of expenditure and
The utility certificate should be submitted to the government without fail within 1 month.
6. Maharashtra Budget Manual, School Code and Fiscal while the Controller General of Expenditure.
The rights mentioned in the manual as well as issued by the Planning Department, Finance Department as well as this Department from time to time.
The guidelines made and the norms in force, the delegations of financial powers as well as the instructions given from time to time.
Follow strictly.
7. Funds / grants may not be spent for any purpose other than the purpose for which they are sanctioned. As well as other
Funds cannot be diverted to the head of the account.
The memorandum was made available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashtra.gov.in.
